# Vendored dependencies

`wgpu/` is the unmodified upstream `wgpu` `v30.0.0` source tree from
<https://github.com/gfx-rs/wgpu>, commit
`8bf3e5ff4ab45e2c150e0d6c70d01d25f5b126c1`.

`nebula/` is based on upstream Nebula commit
`b9b7cfc9d071aab999ae1e8ce98f576e67c82c80` from
<https://github.com/Far-Beyond-Pulsar/Nebula>. Its workspace `wgpu`
dependency and source are maintained here for compatibility with the vendored
wgpu release used by Helio.
